"[59] RSO HAD REPORTS OF THE TOW TRUCK DRIVER RUNNING THROUGH THE CONSTRUCTION SITE // ONE PTY HAD EYES OF THE TOW TRUCK DRIVER SHOOTING OUT THE WINDOW AND ONE CALLER SAW THE TOW TRUCK DRIVER POINT THE GUN TO HIMSELF [Shared]"

"[54] [Notification] [CHP]-***PER RSO HAS A CALL OF A SHOOTING ON THE SR74 AND RIBBONWOOD /// VIC IS THE TOW TRUCK DRIVER *******RSO IS GETTING CONFLICTING INFO ON THEIR END AS WELL // TOW TRUCK FIRED GUN OO THE WINDOW TWDS THE CONSTRUCTION CREW // TOW TRUCK DRIVER IS THE SHOOTER // ONE CALLER STATED SUBJ POSS SHOT HIMSELF [Shared]"
"[25] CONSTRUCTION WORKER WITT THE TOW TRUCK DRIVER ON THE GROUND // 1 LN SHUT DWN AND THERE IS A PILOT [Shared]"
"[21] [Notification] [CHP]-RP ADVS THERE WAS A SHOOTING REPORTING /// THE TOW TRUCK DRIVER WAS SHOT [Shared]"
"[15] PER DUP INV'D SV 1185 WAS 23103 CROSSING DBLE YELS PRIOR, SLAMMED ON BRAKED AND CAUSED THE TC [Shared]"
"[11] RP CANT RECALL THE NAME OF THE TOW COMPANY //ALL HE RECALLS IS IT WAS BLK [Shared]"
"[10] TOW TRK SAID JERRDAN ON THE REAR OF THE TRK [Shared]"
"[8] DECLINED MEDICAL // TOW TRUCK CONT UP THE MOUNTAIN // TOW TRUCK WAS BLK [Shared]"
"[6] PER TH INV 1185 WAS 23103 PRIOR TO THE TC // SLAMMED ON HIS BREAKS AND CAUSED THE TC [Shared]"

"[24] 59-10 SEMI DRIVER CLAIMS DRIVER OF PK PULLING TRLR CROSSED INTO HIS LANE AND SIDE SWIPED / ANOTHER PTY 97 CLAIMING THEY HIT DEBRIS THAT DAMAGED THEIR CAR [Shared]"

Log.LocationDesc: "***EB and WB 8 ONR/OFR AT LK MURRAY***"

details.IncidentDetail: "[5] [Notification] [CHP]-AN RP CALLED AND ADVS TRFC IS BACKED UP - VEH'S HONKING AND STUCK - REQ A UNIT FOR TRFC CONTROL [Shared]"
"[3] ^EB and WB 8 ONR/OFRS AT LAKE MURRAY BLVD; SIGNALS PLACED ON FLASH TIL TOMORROW (6/3) @ 0530 HRS, FOR CITY OF LA MESA WATER PIPELINE CONST"
